creator: Maureen Murdock
work: The Heroine's Journey: Woman's Quest for Wholeness

axioms.name: Internal Integration
axioms.statement: The journey is primarily internal and psycho-spiritual, focusing on integration rather than external conquest.

axioms.name: Circular path
axioms.statement: Narrative progression follows a circular or spiral path, returning to reclaimed values with new understanding.

axioms.name: Harmonization of Psyche
axioms.statement: Structural success is measured by the harmonization of the feminine and masculine aspects of the psyche.

levels.name: HEROINE_JOURNEY
levels.description: The complete cycle of internal transformation

levels.name: STAGE
levels.description: One of ten distinct phases of development

levels.name: PSYCHIC_REVELATION
levels.description: An atomic emotional beat indicating internal shift

core_algorithms.name: The Integration Cycle
core_algorithms.purpose: Structure a narrative around the 10 stages of the Heroine's Journey
core_algorithms.pseudocode: 1. SEPARATION from the feminine; 2. IDENTIFICATION with the masculine; 3. ROAD of trials; 4. ILLUSORY BOON of success; 5. INITIATION & DESCENT; 6. YEARNING to reconnect; 7. HEALING the mother/daughter split; 8. HEALING the wounded masculine; 9. INTEGRATION; 10. RETURN to community;

diagnostic_questions.question: Does the protagonist begin by rejecting traditional 'feminine' roles or values?
Is the 'Illusory Boon' (Act II success) followed by a period of spiritual aridity?
Does the protagonist perform a 'Descent' into the subconscious to reclaim lost values?
Is the climax an act of internal integration rather than an external battle?
Does the narrative return to its starting point with a transformed perspective (Circular)?
Does the ending synthesize the 'masculine' and 'feminine' aspects of the character?
